    "The tension in each sling leg is approximately 1,154.7 lbs, which is well below the tagged vertical WLL of 2,000 lbs per leg."

  "actions": [
    "Proceed with the planned lift using the specified rigging configuration."
  ],
  "rationale": "For a symmetric two-leg sling arrangement, the tension in each leg is calculated as (Load / 2) / sin(angle). Here, (2,000 lbs / 2) / sin(60 degrees) = 1,000 / 0.8660 = 1,154.7 lbs. Since the tension in each leg (1,154.7 lbs) is less than the rated capacity (2,000 lbs), the configuration is safe and compliant.",

    "OSHA 1926.251"
  ]
